source: US Census Bureau, Business Trends and Outlook Survey (BTOS) — share of firms using AI to produce goods or services
note: PINNED, APPROXIMATE. Values track the published BTOS national AI-use trend (rose from ~3.7% in late 2023 into high single digits by 2025). Update with exact biweekly figures from the BTOS National.xlsx (https://www.census.gov/hfp/btos/downloads/National.xlsx). Human-gated like the METR snapshot — a live xlsx-parse job is a future enhancement.
